title: MicroTech
description: Lightweight technology modpack that focus on being fun and having lots of features will remaining mostly lag free.
body:
MicroTech is a lightweight technology modpack aimed at the modern period

## Features : ### - 🏭 Industrial things with Immersive Engineering & Immersive Petroleum ### - 💻 Powerful electronics with OpenComputers and SecurityCraft ! ### - ⚡ Lag free experience with optimization mods ! (and tested on my potato PC) ### - ✨ Other great mods like Rechiseled, Ambient Sound and more ! ## Why ? I made MicroTech to play Minecraft 1.12.2, with some great mods I like, will keeping my frames from dropping. That why this modpack is simple, even if I find it really fun to play. ## Other things : Mods in this modpack that are not on Modrinth : - [Immersive Petroleum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-petroleum) - [Flux Networks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flux-networks) This modpack will soon be tested on a server to check for performance issue.
